caption: A person's hand is shown interacting with a light blue piece of furniture, possibly a dresser or a cabinet. In the beginning, the hand rests on the flat top surface of the furniture. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves down to a drawer, where a finger is inserted into a circular cutout to pull the drawer open. The person is wearing a ring on their finger. Throughout the clip, white text is centered on the screen that reads, "carrying colorful suitcases, raising up tents." The background is a plain, neutral-colored wall. The lighting is soft and consistent, focusing on the manual action of opening the drawer.
